system.name: VITO Telemetry Engine
system.purpose: Capture user behavior to drive AI-powered UX personalization, feature ranking, and product improvement
system.privacy: GDPR/CCPA compliant. All user-identifiable data encrypted at rest. Aggregated analytics use differential privacy (ε=1.0). Tenant-isolated by default.
system.opt_out: Available per-tenant and per-user. Telemetry collection halts immediately on opt-out.
system.data_retention: Raw events: 90 days. Aggregated metrics: 36 months. Session recordings: 30 days (opt-in only).

events.purpose: Navigation path analysis, heatmap generation, feature importance weighting

events.description: User interacts with a specific feature
events.purpose: Feature adoption tracking, dead feature detection, ROI calculation per feature
Search relevance optimization, autocomplete improvement, knowledge gap detection
Keyboard shortcut popularity, missing command detection
AI trust calibration, confidence threshold optimization, recommendation ranking

events.description: User creates, edits, or deletes a formula
events.purpose: Workflow efficiency tracking, AI impact measurement
Navigation optimization, sidebar personalization, pin/recent effectiveness

events.description: User favorites, bookmarks, or pins an item

events.purpose: Friction detection, error UX improvement, support prioritization
Session analytics, device optimization, performance monitoring

events.description: User session ends (timeout or explicit logout)
events.purpose: Session quality scoring, task completion rate, productivity measurement

heatmaps.description: Aggregated click and attention heatmaps for each page
heatmaps.method: Kernel density estimation on click coordinates with time-weighting (30-day exponential decay)
heatmaps.output: Heatmap overlays for UX review; identifies: dead zones (no interaction), rage clicks (rapid repeated clicks), and attention hotspots
heatmaps.visualization: Overlay heatmap on page screenshot with intensity legend

behavior_clusters.description: User segmentation based on behavioral patterns
behavior_clusters.method: K-means clustering (k=5) on normalized feature vectors: session_frequency, avg_session_duration, ai_adoption_rate, search_vs_browse_ratio, feature_diversity

clusters.label: Power Users
clusters.characteristics: Daily usage, high AI adoption, uses keyboard shortcuts, creates 3+ formulas/week

clusters.label: AI Enthusiasts
clusters.characteristics: Heavy AI feature usage, moderate formula creation, explores experimental features

clusters.label: Traditional Perfumers
clusters.characteristics: Manual formula creation, low AI adoption, high sidebar navigation, prefers library over wizard

clusters.label: Dashboard Browsers
clusters.characteristics: Views dashboards, rarely creates formulas, short sessions, possible wrong persona

clusters.label: At-Risk / Idle
clusters.characteristics: Login frequency declining, no formula activity in 14+ days, long gaps between sessions

navigation_optimization.description: AI-driven sidebar, breadcrumb, and quick-action optimization
navigation_optimization.method: Markov chain model of navigation paths → PageRank for feature importance → Adaptive sidebar ordering
outputs: Reorder sidebar sections by user frequency (per-user, updated weekly)
Surface 'next likely action' as inline suggestion

dashboard_personalization.description: Per-user dashboard widget ordering and content
dashboard_personalization.method: Multi-armed bandit (Thompson sampling) on widget engagement signals (click, hover, dwell time, interaction depth)
outputs: Reorder dashboard widgets by predicted engagement
Show/hide widgets based on role + behavior
Adjust KPI thresholds based on user's historical attention patterns

recommendation_ranking.description: Use telemetry to improve AI recommendation relevance
recommendation_ranking.method: LambdaMART learning-to-rank on recommendation acceptance/rejection history
recommendation_ranking.feedback_loop: Recommendation shown → User accepts/rejects/modifies → Acceptance signal feeds back into ranking model → Next recommendations re-ranked
